plant.description: Drinking water kept in Vijaysar wood cups is a traditional diabetic remedy.

method_1.method: Soak wood in water overnight and drink in the morning.

medicinal_uses: Effectively controls high blood sugar levels.
Treats skin diseases and intestinal worms.

safety_profile.medical_supervision: Use under the guidance of a qualified Ayurvedic practitioner.
